free_text: Sequential and simultaneous emission of particles from
p+Al collisions at GeV energies
COSY
Self-supporting Al of 170 ug/cm2
Telescopes at 15.6, 20 and 65 deg were
installed in air behind 50 um stainless steel foils
Telescopes at 15.6, 20, 65 and 100 deg were
backed by a 7 cm thick CSI detector to detect high-
energy light charged-particles passing through the Si
detectors.
Mass and charge identification
8.023 mb at 1.2 GeV, 9.515 mb at 1.9 GeV, and
10.099 mb at 2.5 GeV
Only statistical
Normalization at 3 proton energies (~9%)
Data received from Boguslaw Kamys
Approved by Boguslaw Kamys (2014-06-04)
On. Received from Boguslaw Kamys.
